name: agentic-studio
description: Multi-domain AI orchestrator for Claude Code. Turns natural language into autonomous agent swarm workflows across six domains — no API key, no separate program. Runs entirely inside your Claude Code session. SDLC: autonomous builds (GREENFIELD / FEATURE / SURGICAL), global dependency-graph scheduler, design-system routing, TDD, two-stage code review, live dashboard. Marketing: competitor research, SEO/AEO, campaign briefs, content calendars. Research: deep market analysis, industry reports, investor briefs, source-validated findings. Strategy: PRDs, roadmaps, OKRs, GTM plans (connects to SDLC pipeline). Content: quality-gated blogs, newsletters, social variants, pitch decks. Daily: meeting prep, email drafts, weekly reviews, decision frameworks, SOPs.
